UI_POS_NoActiveOps: No active operations. Tune to POSnet frequency to receive broadcasts.
UI_POS_OperationExpired: Operation expired — window of opportunity has closed.
UI_POS_GuideIntro: POSnet is a radio-driven procedural operations system. Intercept military broadcasts to receive field operations, then complete objectives to fulfil them.
UI_POS_GuideStep1: 1. Find a radio (any type) and a computer (desktop or portable).
UI_POS_GuideStep2: 2. Place a desktop computer near the radio (within 3 tiles), or carry a portable computer.
UI_POS_GuideStep3: 3. Turn the radio on and ensure it has power.
UI_POS_GuideStep4: 4. Right-click the radio and select 'Connect to POSnet'.
UI_POS_GuideNote: Operations are broadcast at regular intervals. Keep your terminal open to receive new missions.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_TradeRoute: Funding a trade route to the northern settlements.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_ScrapMetal: Bulk scrap metal acquisition from the industrial district.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_FuelRun: Fuel convoy to the refinery and back. High demand, good margins.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_MedicalSupply: Medical supply run to the hospital wing. Urgent need.

UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_ToolSmithing: Setting up a tool-smithing operation. Anvil and forge needed.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_RadioParts: Sourcing radio components for the relay network expansion.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_Ammunition: Ammunition reloading supplies. Brass, primers, powder.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_ShelterRepair: Shelter reinforcement materials. Lumber, nails, tarps.

UI_POS_Tutorial_Toast_FirstDelivery: Delivery complete! Courier missions build reputation quickly.

UI_POS_Tutorial_Toast_FirstCrossCorrelat: Cross-correlation detected! Multiple intel sources combined.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstConnection_Li: You have connected to the POSnet Bulletin Board System. This terminal is your gateway to field operations, market intelligence, and the underground economy.
Check the BBS for available operations — these are your primary source of income and reputation. Complete missions to unlock higher tiers.
Visit commercial areas (shops, warehouses, gas stations) and right-click to gather Market Intel. Raw notes can be processed later at a computer terminal.
Tip: Keep your radio tuned to the correct frequency and stay near a computer. Signal strength affects what you can access.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstOpCompleted_L: Congratulations on completing your first field operation! Your reputation with POSnet contacts is growing.
Gather Market Intel from commercial locations — right-click in shops, gas stations, and warehouses. Each note captures local price data.
Your SIGINT skill improves as you complete operations and gather intel. At Level 3, you will unlock Terminal Analysis — a powerful tool for processing raw data.
Tip: Diversify your activities between operations, deliveries, and intel gathering. Each contributes to your SIGINT progression.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_SigintL3_Line1: You have reached SIGINT Level 3 — Pattern Seeker. A new capability is now available: Terminal Analysis.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_SigintL3_Line2: Find a computer terminal and use Process Intelligence to convert raw market notes into refined intelligence fragments. Feed in multiple notes for better results.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_SigintL3_Line3: Look for data recorders and media (microcassettes, floppy disks) in the field. These passive devices capture ambient intelligence that supplements your notes.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_SigintL3_Line4: Tip: At SIGINT Level 6, cross-correlation becomes available — combining diverse sources produces high-confidence insights.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstCamera_Line1: You have produced your first compiled intelligence artifact at a camera workstation. These Tier III products are the backbone of advanced market analysis.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstCamera_Line2: Camera workstations offer three operations: Site Survey Compilation, Recorded Tape Review, and Market Bulletin Production. Each creates different artifact types.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstCamera_Line3: Market Bulletins grant bonus reputation and influence category prices when distributed. Look for satellite dishes to broadcast your compiled reports even further.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstCamera_Line4: Tip: Higher equipment condition and SIGINT skill improve artifact quality. Keep your gear maintained.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstSatellite_Lin: Your first satellite broadcast has been transmitted. This is the apex of the intelligence hierarchy — Tier IV market propagation.
Satellite broadcasts push compiled intelligence into the regional market, affecting prices and generating significant reputation. Stronger reports have greater impact.
Dishes require calibration and electricity. Power outages cause decalibration over time, so maintain your generators. A terminal within range receives enhancement bonuses.
Tip: The endgame loop is gather → process → compile → broadcast. Each cycle improves your standing and market influence.

UI_POS_PN_Fragment_Infrastructure: Radio intel: grid status update received
UI_WBN_Forecast_Opener_ThreeDays_02: Looking ahead to the end of the week:
UI_WBN_Forecast_Power_Failure_01: Grid instability detected. Prepare for possible outage.
UI_WBN_Forecast_Power_Failure_02: Power grid analysis suggests mains electricity may fail soon. Secure generator fuel.
UI_WBN_Forecast_Power_Failure_03: Signs of grid degradation. Stock fuel and batteries.

UI_WBN_Forecast_Econ_Down: %1 availability in %2 %3 improve over the period.
UI_WBN_Forecast_Econ_Convoy: A supply convoy is expected to arrive in %1 within %2 days.
UI_WBN_Forecast_Closer_03: This is a projection, not a guarantee.

UI_WBN_Ops_Garbled_04: ...operational broadcast detected but unreadable... you lack the training to decode this...
UI_WBN_Ops_AgentState_transit: Agent {agent} is en route. Signal nominal.
UI_WBN_Ops_AgentState_delayed: Runner {agent} is behind schedule. Possible route disruption.
UI_WBN_Ops_AgentState_compromised: Warning: Agent {agent} reports contact difficulties. Mission at risk.
UI_WBN_Ops_AgentState_completed: Agent {agent} has returned from the field. Debriefing in progress.
UI_WBN_Ops_AgentState_negotiation: Agent {agent} has reached the contact point. Negotiation underway.
UI_WBN_Ops_AgentState_settlement: Agent {agent} is completing the exchange. Settlement in progress.
UI_WBN_Ops_MissionSuccess: Operation complete. Objective secured. All units accounted for.
UI_WBN_Ops_MissionFailure: Operation terminated. Objective not achieved. Assess losses and regroup.
UI_WBN_Ops_WholesalerPosture: Supply line posture change detected. Wholesaler activity shifting.
UI_WBN_Ops_GenericUpdate: Operational status update received from the field.
UI_WBN_Ops_WS_Posture_01: Supply chain posture shifting. Wholesaler routes are being redrawn.
UI_WBN_Ops_WS_Posture_02: Movement detected along wholesaler corridors. Expect changes in availability.
UI_WBN_Ops_WS_Posture_03: Wholesaler network recalibrating. Trade lines may be affected.
UI_WBN_Ops_WS_Posture_04: Our sources report wholesaler activity changing. Adjust procurement plans.
UI_WBN_Ops_Generic_01: Operational status update received from the field.
UI_WBN_Ops_Generic_02: Field report logged. Situation developing, details pending.
UI_WBN_Ops_Generic_03: Update received via operations channel. Assessment ongoing.
UI_WBN_Ops_Generic_04: New intelligence registered. Review terminal for details.
UI_WBN_Ops_Transit_01: Agent {agent} is en route to the contact point. Signal nominal.
UI_WBN_Ops_Transit_02: Field operative {agent} has departed. Tracking signal steady.
UI_WBN_Ops_Transit_03: Runner {agent} is moving through the corridor. All clear so far.
UI_WBN_Ops_Transit_04: Unit {agent} confirmed in transit. Estimated arrival within the window.
UI_WBN_Ops_Delayed_01: Runner {agent} is behind schedule. Possible route disruption.
UI_WBN_Ops_Delayed_02: Agent {agent} has missed the check-in window. Monitoring continues.
UI_WBN_Ops_Delayed_03: Operative {agent} reports delays. Route may be compromised.
UI_WBN_Ops_Delayed_04: Field unit {agent} is overdue. No hostile contact reported yet.
UI_WBN_Ops_Compromised_01: Warning: Agent {agent} reports contact difficulties. Mission at risk.
UI_WBN_Ops_Compromised_02: Alert: Operative {agent} has encountered resistance. Situation developing.
UI_WBN_Ops_Compromised_03: Field unit {agent} signals distress. Extraction may be required.
UI_WBN_Ops_Compromised_04: Agent {agent} has gone dark after reporting hostile contact. Stand by.
UI_WBN_Ops_Completed_01: Agent {agent} has returned from the field. Debriefing in progress.
UI_WBN_Ops_Completed_02: Operative {agent} back at base. Mission debrief underway.
UI_WBN_Ops_Completed_03: Runner {agent} has completed the assignment. Assets recovered.
UI_WBN_Ops_Completed_04: Field unit {agent} reporting in. Operation concluded.
UI_WBN_Ops_MissionOK_01: Operation complete. Objective secured. All units accounted for.
UI_WBN_Ops_MissionOK_02: Mission success confirmed. Package delivered as contracted.
UI_WBN_Ops_MissionOK_03: Objective achieved. Resources secured. Good work out there.
UI_WBN_Ops_MissionOK_04: Operation concluded successfully. Awaiting next tasking.
UI_WBN_Ops_MissionFail_01: Operation terminated. Objective not achieved. Assess losses and regroup.
UI_WBN_Ops_MissionFail_02: Mission failure confirmed. Assets lost in the field.
UI_WBN_Ops_MissionFail_03: Objective not secured. Recommend reassessment before next deployment.
UI_WBN_Ops_MissionFail_04: Operation failed. Review operational parameters before retasking.
UI_POS_Fragments_NoData_Hint: Tune a radio to a WBN frequency and listen for broadcasts.
UI_POS_Fragments_NoSelection: Select a fragment to view details.
UI_POS_Network_SatelliteBroadcast_Desc: Tier IV uplink control and regional broadcast
UI_POS_Satellite_NoDish: No satellite dish linked to this terminal.
UI_POS_Entropy_PN_Cold: %1 market in %2 is SILENT -- data may be unreliable
UI_POS_Entropy_PN_Blackout: Power grid failure in %1 -- intelligence degrading
UI_POS_Entropy_PN_Shadow: Information shadow over %1 in %2 -- data unreliable
UI_POS_Broadcast_PN_Resolved: Broadcast influence on %1 in %2 has dissipated
UI_POS_Tutorial_Toast_FirstWBNBulletin: You've received your first radio bulletin! Tune a vanilla radio to WBN frequencies to hear market reports, weather updates, and emergency broadcasts. Listening generates intelligence fragments.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Toast_FirstSignalFragmen: Signal fragment captured! Radio broadcasts generate low-confidence market intelligence. Fragments appear in your terminal's Signal Fragments screen.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Toast_FirstEntropyWarnin: Market data is ageing! Without fresh observations, certainty decays over time. Active recon and radio listening fight information decay.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Toast_FirstTrade: First trade completed! POSnet offers three ways to sell: spot trades, contracts, and free agent deployment. Each has different risk and reward profiles.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Toast_FirstFreeAgent: Free agent deployed! Agents operate autonomously -- they assemble, travel, negotiate, and settle. Monitor their progress on the Contacts screen.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Toast_FirstRelayDiscover: Relay site discovered! Strategic relays are Tier V installations that coordinate the POSnet network. Connect to manage bandwidth and signal routing.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Toast_FirstMarketView: Welcome to the Markets terminal. Prices, trends, and confidence levels are shown per category. Data quality indicators show how reliable each reading is.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Toast_FirstBroadcastMode: Satellite broadcast mode selected! Different modes affect markets differently: scarcity alerts push prices up, surplus notices push them down. Your broadcast reputation affects regional trust.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_WBN_Line1: POSnet's radio network broadcasts market intelligence, weather reports, and emergency alerts on dedicated frequencies.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_WBN_Line2: Tune any vanilla radio to a WBN frequency to hear bulletins from market reporters, military logisticians, and field correspondents.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_WBN_Line3: Listening generates Signal Fragments -- low-confidence intelligence that feeds into your terminal's market data over time.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_WBN_Line4: Keep a radio on near your base. The longer you listen, the more your picture of the market builds -- but stale data decays without reinforcement.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Entropy_Line1: Market intelligence in POSnet is never permanent. Data ages, certainty erodes, and neglected regions become unreliable.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Entropy_Line2: The terminal shows atmospheric labels like 'Market picture ageing' or 'Conflicting field readings' when data quality drops.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Entropy_Line3: Active recon (scanning, recording, camera analysis) fights decay. Radio listening helps but provides lower-confidence data.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Entropy_Line4: Storms and blackouts accelerate decay. Winter is especially harsh. Maintain your intelligence network -- or trade on ghosts and guesses.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Trade_Line1: POSnet offers three ways to sell goods: spot trades, contracts, and free agent deployment.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Trade_Line2: Spot trades are instant but offer the lowest price. Contracts commit you to a delivery for better terms. Free agents handle everything autonomously.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Trade_Line3: Market prices fluctuate based on zone pressure, events, and broadcast influence. Buy low in surplus zones, sell high in scarcity zones.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Trade_Line4: Your reputation and SIGINT skill affect prices and negotiation success. Build trust through accurate intelligence and reliable deliveries.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Relay_Line1: You've discovered a Tier V Strategic Relay site -- a permanent signal installation at a civic facility.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Relay_Line2: Unlike Tier IV (broadcasting), Tier V coordinates the network itself: relay queuing, bandwidth allocation, and signal routing.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Relay_Line3: Connect to the relay via the terminal to access the Relay Command dashboard. Calibrate the dish, manage bandwidth, and monitor network health.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_Relay_Line4: Relay sites require power and maintenance. A well-maintained relay network dramatically improves signal quality across the region.
